svg.title: Galaxy Arbitrage full funnel architecture
svg.desc: TikTok traffic flows into a link-in-bio page, which routes to six dedicated landing pages, all feeding the Galaxy Arbitrage mailing list, which then distributes to monetization outputs.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I optimize TikTok content to drive traffic to my link in bio?')
sendPrompt('How should the link in bio page be structured for self-segmentation?')
sendPrompt('Build me a car accident lead capture landing page with a form for legal referral')
sendPrompt('Build me an insurance lead capture landing page')
sendPrompt('Build me a performance parts lead capture landing page')
sendPrompt('Build me an automation systems lead capture landing page for GalaxyBuilt')
sendPrompt('Build me a remote income and geo-arbitrage lead capture landing page')
sendPrompt('Build me a real estate lead capture landing page')
sendPrompt('Design the Galaxy Arbitrage mailing list slow-burn email sequence')
sendPrompt('How do I structure the accident lead forwarding workflow to lawyers?')
sendPrompt('How do I convert automation leads from the mailing list into GalaxyBuilt clients?')
sendPrompt('How do I monetize the performance parts and insurance email segments?')
sendPrompt('What are the best geo-arbitrage and remote income offers to promote to my list?')

svg.text: Solo $500–$1k · Couple $1k–$2k · Family / multi-victim $2k–$4k · Uber / commercial vehicle +premium
All 6 landing pages feed one list — segments are tags, not separate lists
